landing.hero_desc: A.I Do is your AI wedding planning partner — from setting a budget and building a timeline to drafting vendor emails and coordinating the big day itself.
landing.video_desc: A quick look at what A.IDO can do for your wedding.
landing.features_desc: Eight AI-powered tools designed for your wedding journey.
landing.final_desc: Start planning your perfect wedding with A.IDO. It's free to get started.
landing.footer_brand: A.I Do — AI Wedding Planning OS

features.timeline_desc: A perfect minute-by-minute schedule for your day.
features.budget_desc: Track spending and predict costs with AI.
features.checklist_desc: Month-by-month tasks tailored to your date.
features.emails_desc: Professional emails drafted by AI in seconds.
features.contracts_desc: AI reviews your vendor contracts and flags risks before you sign.
features.profile_desc: Your vision, style, and details — all in one place.
features.seating_desc: Auto-generate the perfect seating arrangement for your guests.
features.collector_desc: Share a link so guests submit their own contact info and address.
features.assistant_desc: Your AI planning companion — and emergency support when your wedding day arrives.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, language, and collaborators.
settings.language_desc: Sets the display language for the entire platform.
settings.collaborators_desc: Invite your partner, planner, or vendors to access your wedding.
settings.role_partner_desc: Full access to all planning tools
settings.delete_account_desc: Permanently removes all your wedding data and cancels your account. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_account_item_1: Your wedding profile and all settings
settings.delete_account_item_2: Budget, checklist, timeline, and vendor data
settings.delete_account_item_3: Guest list, seating chart, and wedding party
settings.delete_account_warning: This action is permanent and cannot be reversed.
settings.cc_email_desc: Get a copy of every vendor message in your personal inbox. The vendor will see this address and can reply-all to include you directly.
settings.remove_collab_desc: This will revoke their access to your wedding.
settings.no_collabs_desc: Invite your partner, planner, or vendors.
settings.invite_link_desc: Share this link to grant access:
settings.invite_ready_desc: Your email app should open with the invite pre-filled.
settings.collab_section_desc: People who have been invited to your wedding workspace.
settings.invite_collaborator_desc: Invite your partner, wedding planner, or vendors to collaborate on your wedding workspace.
settings.invite_link_created_msg: Invite link created — your email app should be opening.
settings.email_didnt_open: Or copy the link above if your email app didn't open.
settings.no_collabs_invite: No collaborators yet. Invite someone above to get started.
settings.account_settings_desc: Manage your name, email, password, and connected accounts through your Clerk profile.

profile.title: Wedding Profile
profile.subtitle: The foundation of your planning journey.
profile.your_details_desc: Tell us about your dream day.
profile.ceremony_at_venue: Ceremony will take place at a separate location
profile.saved_toast_desc: Your wedding details have been updated.
profile.save_error: Failed to save profile. Please try again.
profile.ceremony_at_venue_desc: Tick this if your ceremony is not at your reception venue

aria.name: Aria
aria.title: Hi, I'm Aria
aria.subtitle: Your AI wedding planning assistant. Ask me anything.
aria.input_placeholder: Ask Aria anything about your wedding…
aria.clear_all_confirm: Delete all past conversations? This can't be undone.
aria.welcome_body: Your personal wedding planning assistant. I can answer questions and take real actions in your portal — add vendors, create checklist items, update your timeline, and more.
aria.keyboard_hint: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line · Conversation history saved automatically
aria.delete_confirm: Delete this conversation? This can't be undone.
aria.starter_1: Add a vendor to my vendor list for me
aria.starter_2: What questions should I ask a photographer before booking?
aria.starter_3: Add a new expense for me
aria.starter_4: What should I prioritize 6 months before my wedding?
aria.starter_5: How much is left in my budget to spend?
aria.starter_6: Add a new guest for me

budget.title: Budget Tracker
budget.subtitle: Track every dollar across your wedding.
budget.vendor_synced_desc: Pulled automatically from your Vendor List. Edit these by opening the vendor — they're read-only here.
budget.manual_expenses_desc: Anything outside your vendor list — dress, rings, décor, tips, hotel, DIY, gifts, etc.
budget.summary_desc: Combined totals across vendor and manual expenses.
budget.dialog_description: Track a non-vendor cost like rings, décor, or tips.

checklist.title: Wedding Checklist
checklist.subtitle: Your month-by-month plan.
checklist.no_checklist_desc: Generate a smart checklist tailored to your wedding date.
checklist.profile_required_desc: Please complete your wedding profile first.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.subtitle: Manage every vendor for your big day.
vendors.no_vendors_desc: Add all your wedding vendors in one place — venue, caterer, photographer, florist, and more. Track costs, contracts, and payment schedules.
vendors.no_files_desc: No files yet. Add contracts, invoices, or receipts.
vendors.remove_vendor_desc: This will permanently delete the vendor and all associated payments. This action cannot be undone.
vendors.remove_payment_desc: This will permanently delete this payment milestone.
vendors.no_payments_yet: No payments scheduled yet. Add your deposit and final payment milestones.
vendors.msg_no_email_warning: This vendor has no email address. Add one in the Edit dialog so messages can be delivered.
vendors.msg_no_messages: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.
vendors.msg_replies_arrive_hint: Vendor replies arrive here automatically when they reply to your email.
vendors.msg_spam_warning: First-time emails to vendors may land in their spam or promotions folder. If you don't hear back in 1–2 days, give them a quick text or call to check, and ask them to mark this address as "not spam" so future messages reach their inbox.
vendors.msg_cc_placeholder_empty: your@email.com — press Enter to add (no limit)
vendors.msg_cc_hint: Add as many CC recipients as you like — press Enter, comma, space, or paste a list. They'll be CC'd on every message you send to vendors and can reply-all to include you directly.
vendors.msg_placeholder: Write a message to the vendor... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
vendors.msg_placeholder_no_email: Add an email address for this vendor first.
vendors.msg_cc_recipients_one: Vendor messages will also go to {{n}} recipient.
vendors.msg_cc_recipients_other: Vendor messages will also go to {{n}} recipients.
vendors.draft_dialog_desc: The draft will appear in your message box below — review and edit before sending.
vendors.draft_details_placeholder: e.g. We love your dark and moody style, want an 8-hour package…
vendors.draft_ready_desc: Inserted into your message box — edit and send when ready.

guests.title: Guest List
guests.subtitle: Track RSVPs, meals, and seating for everyone.
guests.new_guest_desc: Add someone to your guest list.
guests.no_guests_desc: Add your first guest or share a collector link.
guests.dietary_placeholder: e.g. Gluten-free, nut allergy, halal, kosher…
guests.collector_desc: Generate a shareable link so guests can submit their mailing address and contact info for invitations. RSVP is managed separately by you.
guests.link_preview_label: Preview — what guests see when you share this link:
guests.collecting_addresses: are collecting addresses for their wedding invitations
guests.regenerate_desc: The current link will stop working immediately. Anyone who has the old link won't be able to use it anymore.
guests.link_auto_appears: Their info will appear in your guest list automatically once submitted.
guests.old_link_inactive: The old link is now inactive.
guests.empty_desc: Start adding guests to track RSVPs, meal choices, and seating assignments.
guests.no_match: No guests match your search or filter.
guests.remove_desc: This will permanently remove them from your guest list.
guests.failed_to_load: Failed to load guest list. Please refresh.

timeline.title: Wedding Day Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A minute-by-minute schedule for your big day.
timeline.no_timeline_desc: Generate a timeline tailored to your ceremony and reception times.
timeline.vision_card_desc: Describe the atmosphere, tone, and moments that matter most — AI will use this to create a timeline that truly reflects your day.
timeline.vision_placeholder: e.g. We want a calm, intimate morning with just close family before the ceremony. The afternoon should feel celebratory and high-energy with lots of dancing…
timeline.no_timeline_generate_desc: Fill in your vision above, then let our AI create a perfect flow for your wedding day.
timeline.profile_required_desc: Please complete your wedding profile first.
timeline.generated_desc: Your personalized wedding day timeline is ready.
timeline.generation_failed_desc: Could not generate the timeline. Please try again.
timeline.pdf_downloaded_desc: Your timeline has been saved as a PDF.
timeline.pdf_failed_desc: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.

hotels.title: Hotel Blocks
hotels.subtitle: Manage hotel room blocks and discount codes for your guests.
hotels.no_hotels_desc: Add hotels where you've negotiated room blocks for your guests. Track discount codes, cutoff dates, and booking progress all in one place.
hotels.no_blocks_desc: Add a block to share booking info with your out-of-town guests.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: Upload, analyze, and store every vendor contract.
contracts.no_contracts_desc: Upload your first vendor contract above to get an AI review.
contracts.name_contract: Name this contract in the system
contracts.display_name_hint: This is just the display name — you can rename it later too.
contracts.extracting: Extracting red flags and payment dates
contracts.click_to_browse: or click to browse · PDF or TXT · max 10 MB
contracts.no_analysis: No analysis available for this contract.
contracts.ai_draft_desc: AI will draft a professional email you can send directly to the vendor — addressing each red flag diplomatically and requesting specific contract changes.
contracts.edit_note: Edit as needed — replace [Your Names] and [Vendor Name] before sending.
contracts.unsupported_file_desc: Please upload a PDF or .txt file.
contracts.drop_pdf: Drop a contract PDF here or
contracts.supported_formats: PDF, DOCX or TXT · up to 10 MB
contracts.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete the contract and its analysis.

party.title: Wedding Party
party.subtitle: Bridesmaids, groomsmen, and your entire wedding party — all in one place.
party.empty_desc: Add your bridesmaids, groomsmen, flower girls, and more. Keep all their contact info and notes in one place.
party.remove_member_desc: This will permanently remove them from your wedding party.
party.load_error: Failed to load wedding party. Please refresh.
party.no_members_desc: Add your bridesmaids, groomsmen, and other party roles.

dayof.title: The Big Day
dayof.subtitle: Your live coordination dashboard for the wedding day itself.
dayof.reset_confirm: Reset all edits to the original AI-generated timeline?
dayof.whats_wrong: What's going wrong right now? Be specific.
dayof.emergency_placeholder: e.g. Florist forgot the bridal bouquet, ceremony is in 45 minutes!

seating.title: AI Seating Chart Generator
seating.subtitle: Add your guests, flag any tricky dynamics, and let AI arrange everyone harmoniously.
seating.no_tables_desc: Add tables and drag guests to seat them.
seating.tip_text: Use Import from Guest List to pull in everyone you've already added on the Guest List page — no duplicate data entry. Click the arrow on each guest to add relationships: ♥ seats them together, ⚡ keeps them apart.
seating.additional_notes_placeholder: e.g. 'Keep speeches table near the front', 'Couple's parents at Table 1', 'College friends want to dance — seat near the floor'
seating.drag_instruction: Drag any guest to a different table, or hover a name and pick a destination from the Move… dropdown. Hit Save Changes when you're happy with the layout.
seating.unsaved_changes: You've moved guests around — click Save Changes to keep this arrangement.
seating.guests_minimum: Please add at least 2 named guests.
seating.seating_ready_desc: {{n}} guests assigned to {{t}} tables. Drag any guest to move them between tables.
seating.save_changes_success_desc: Your custom seating arrangement has been updated.
seating.save_success_desc: This chart has been saved to your collection.
seating.could_not_save_desc: We couldn't update the saved chart. Please try again.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: We're here to help you plan the perfect day.
help.contact_desc: Send us a message and our team will review it and get back to you as soon as possible.
help.message_received_desc: Thanks for reaching out. The A.IDO team will review your message and respond shortly.
help.subject: Subject
help.subject_placeholder: What do you need help with?
help.message_placeholder: Describe your question or issue in detail…
help.feedback_desc: Help us improve A.IDO. Share ideas, report bugs, or tell us what you love!
help.thank_you_desc: Your feedback means a lot to us. We read every submission and use it to make A.IDO better for couples everywhere.
help.feedback_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind — feature ideas, bug reports, what you love…
help.faq_desc: Quick answers to common questions about A.IDO.
help.still_questions_desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us or ask Aria — our AI assistant (sparkles button, bottom right).

seating.title: AI Seating Chart Generator
seating.subtitle: Add your guests, flag any tricky dynamics, and let AI arrange everyone harmoniously.
seating.toast_cant_load_list_desc: Please go to the Guest List page and check for errors.
seating.toast_list_empty_desc: Add guests on the Guest List page first, then import them here.
seating.toast_no_eligible: No attending or pending guests found.
seating.import_title: Import from Guest List (no duplicate data entry)
seating.tip_text: Use Import from Guest List to pull in everyone you've already added on the Guest List page — no duplicate data entry. Click the arrow on each guest to add relationships: ♥ seats them together, ⚡ keeps them apart.
seating.additional_notes_placeholder: e.g. 'Keep speeches table near the front', 'Couple's parents at Table 1', 'College friends want to dance — seat near the floor'
seating.save_changes_success_desc: Your custom arrangement has been updated.
seating.could_not_save_desc: We couldn't update the saved chart. Please try again.
seating.save_success_desc: This chart has been saved to your collection.
seating.drag_instruction: Drag any guest to another table, or hover a name and pick a destination from the Move… menu. Click Save Changes when you're happy with the arrangement.
seating.unsaved_changes: You've moved guests — click Save Changes to keep this arrangement.
